fields.label: Caller
fields.description: VECRM Employee (rep) who placed/received the call. Set server-side from session.data.vecrm_employee_phone by vecrm.api.log_call — never client-supplied.

fields.label: Lead
fields.description: Optional VECRM Lead this call relates to.

fields.label: Contact Number
fields.description: The number dialled/received. Free-form for now; canonicalised later from the device call log.

fields.label: Call Datetime
fields.description: When the call occurred. Supplied by the device call log or set to now() at manual log time.

fields.label: Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Connected-call duration in seconds. Stored as-is; the device call log supplies it later. Drives is_conversation with disposition.

fields.label: Is Conversation
fields.description: Computed in the controller: 1 when the call connected (disposition not in No Answer/Busy/Switched Off/Wrong Number) AND duration_seconds >= CONVERSATION_MIN (30s).

fields.label: Disposition
fields.options:
Connected
No Answer
Busy
Switched Off
Wrong Number
Callback Requested
Not Interested
Interested/Demo
